title: anthemis nobilis var. aurea
intro: Anthemis nobilis var. aurea, also known as Golden Chamomile, is a variant of the Anthemis nobilis plant, a daisy-like herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its soothing and calming properties, which can help to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. The medicinal properties of Golden Chamomile include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which can help to soothe digestive issues, relieve menstrual cramps, and promote a good night's sleep. In herbal preparations, Golden Chamomile is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, and can also be found in capsule or tincture form.
